title: Reference Standardization for Quantification and Harmonization of Large-Scale Metabolomics.
author: Liu KH Nellis M Uppal K Ma C Tran V Liang Y Walker DI Jones DP
content: S-EPMC7887762 PMC7887762 Reference Standardization for Quantification and Harmonization of Large-Scale Metabolomics. Reference standardization was developed to address quantification and harmonization challenges for high-resolution metabolomics (HRM) data collected across different studies
